AI-Curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi

Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-june-23-oleh-bezuhlyi-umx8c?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BraGeR%2BbBSk2dupSv%2BZKcMw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3j3J5MRoSDfIk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mqqu7zrk~m7-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqqu7zrk-m7
  
🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: Risk-off dominates: Bitcoin slipped below $60,000 as a tech-led Nasdaq selloff, Fed pressure and a capital rotation into AI battered digital assets — even as Europe and the US pushed landmark crypto frameworks forward. 📉 Bitcoin Slides Below $60,000 as Tech Selloff Spreads Bitcoin fell to its lowest level since late 2024 in a broad risk-off move. Deutsche Bank attributed the slump to a hawkish Federal Reserve, persistent spot-ETF outflows, and a rotation of capital out of crypto and into AI plays, as a Nasdaq tech selloff spilled across digital assets. Read full story 🔻 Ethereum Foundation Slashes Budget 40% in Major Reset Vitalik Buterin confirmed the Ethereum Foundation will cut its budget by 40% and reduce headcount by roughly 20%. The reset follows the resignation of co-Executive Director Hsiao-Wei Wang — the ninth senior figure to leave since January — as the organization reorganizes into five clusters amid deep turmoil. More details 🇪🇺 Digital Euro Clears Key European Parliament Vote EU lawmakers backed a legal framework to launch a state-backed digital euro by 2029, aiming to loosen Europe's dependence on US credit-card networks and dollar stablecoins. The bill carries privacy safeguards, holding limits, and no interest payments — a direct challenge to private stablecoin issuers. Read more ⚖️ Kalshi Wins CFTC Approval for Perpetual Futures Prediction-market platform Kalshi secured CFTC clearance to offer perpetual futures — a structure long associated with offshore crypto venues. Analysts say the approval could reshape US derivatives trading and pressure incumbents; shares of established US exchange operators slid on the news. See details 🌍 Ripple Lands Preliminary MiCA Approval in Luxembourg Ripple won preliminary CASP approval from Luxembourg's financial regulator just ahead of the July 1 MiCA deadline, clearing a path to offer RLUSD stablecoin payments and broader crypto services across the European Economic Area's 30 countries — one of the firm's most significant regulatory wins. Read full story 🏛️ Franklin Templeton Launches Dedicated Crypto Division The $1.7 trillion asset manager closed its acquisition of 250 Digital and stood up a new Franklin Crypto division focused exclusively on digital-asset investments. The deal marks another deep TradFi push into the sector, even as the broad

74966.subject: These protocols made over $230M in revenue last week
74966.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/5b0b2815-bf3f-4987-a883-4d459283359f/image.png?t=1781619665)
Follow image link: (https://defillama.com/research/report/variational-and-the-shift-to-onchain-brokerage)
Caption: 

Welcome to the DefiLlama Newsletter. Each week we bring you the most valuable onchain insights from the the deepest DeFi dataset in the world.

Subscribe (https://newsletter.defillama.com)





## Sustained revenues during broader decline

DEX volume has [declined](https://defillama.com/dexs/chains) for five straight months. Over $500b in volume was facilitated during the month of October. May facilitated just ~50% of January’s DEX volume.

TVL is down 46%. But fees & revenue generated by onchain businesses this year is essentially flat and remains durable.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/d22621e9-9be9-4aee-b398-6801976cbf76/weekly-protocol-fees-revenue-2026-ytd_2026-06-22.png?t=1782159303)
Caption: 

If TVL & volume are declining, how are onchain businesses able to keep their revenue steady?

## Onchain businesses are earning more per unit of activity

Fee rate (fees / DEX volume) has risen. Volume fell ~50% but fees remained steady, meaning each remaining dollar of volume is generating 40% more in fees than it was in January. Protocols generally earned 0.68% in fees at the beginning of the year, and that number increased to ~0.90% in recent weeks.

TVL efficiency has also risen. Annualized fees relative to locked TVL went from ~20% in January to 25-30% recently. The locked capital base shrank nearly in half, yet it’s working noticeably harder. A meaningful uptick in capital utilization this year.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/d1621aab-0a3a-43c1-992b-d03a69a1d4f9/tvl-capital-efficiency-annualised-fees-as-of-avg-tvl-5-year-weekly_2026-06-22.png?t=1782171817)
Caption: 

## Polymarket drove Polygon’s increased share of app revenue

In the month of January, apps on Polygon earned $6m, or 1.43% of total app revenue.

In the following months Polygon’s share of total app revenue has risen to over 9% at $22m so far this month.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/5351b9d9-d858-44a7-9980-ca23b16383fd/polygon-revenue-by-protocol-bar-absolute-stacked-weekly_2026-06-22.png?t=1782148066)
Caption: 

Polymarket is the driving force behind Polygon’s app revenue growth. Last week, the prediction market brought in a record $7.5m in revenues and holds $427m in TVL, at all time highs.

The debut of the World Cup (with the World Cup Winner contract crossing $3b in cumulative volume), SpaceX IPO contracts settling and activity from the Iran confl

74938.subject: Immediate Action Required on 878341164164
74938.body:
We have detected potentially compromised Service Account credentials  
associated with your Google Cloud Platform account.




Google Cloud Platform



MY CONSOLE




Notification Suspicious Activity Alert



Potentially compromised credentials for Google Cloud Platform/API project  
My Roport (id: my-roport)



Dear Customer,


We detected a publicly exposed secret for the following OAuth client  
associated with project 878341164164:

Secret for client  
878341164164-mm5q8t2kuk26dj44prkjvl1k27q15026.apps.googleusercontent.com  
found at the following URL:  
https://github.com/NovosadovO/morning-report/blob/a761cad4108b33fcd795b1c249c311e789827fd1/monitor.py

To prevent potential security and abuse risks, you must take action in  
accordance with our OAuth 2.0 Policies guidance to “handle client  
credentials securely”. Your client secret may have been inadvertently  
published in public sources or websites (for instance, the credentials were  
mistakenly uploaded to a code repository). Please note that as the  
project/account owner, you are responsible for securing your client  
credentials.



Immediate action is required to generate a new secret to continue using  
OAuth. We strongly recommend that you take the following steps:


Log in to the Google Cloud Console.
Generate a new client secret following these instructions.
Update any applications or websites to use the new client secret
Take immediate steps to ensure that your client secrets are not embedded in  
public source code systems, stored in download directories, or  
unintentionally shared in other ways.

Thank you for ensuring that your Google OAuth clients are secure. Together  
we can make sure that you and your users are safe.

Sincerely,

Google Cloud Platform Team




GO TO MY CONSOLE




Sincerely,

Google Cloud Platform Trust & Safety




Google

© 2016 Google Inc. 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043

You have received this mandatory service announcement to update you about  
important changes to Google Cloud Platform or your account.

74933.subject: Objednávka OFV34023
74933.body: Dobrý deň pán/pani Oleh Novosadov Ďakujeme Vám za objednávku OFV. Rekapitulácia Vašej objednávky: Kurzy OFV: KAPITÁLOVÝ TRH - stredný stupeň (OFV) (1 rok) Meno: Oleh Novosadov Adresa trvalého bydliska: Trieda SNP 83 04011 Košice Fak. adresa: Trieda SNP 83 04011 Košice Slovenská republika Email: novosadovoleg@gmail.com Poznámka: POZOR DÔLEŽITÁ INFORMÁCIA ! Ďakujeme Vám za zaslanie objednávky kurzov OFV. Objednávka bola prijatá na spracovanie. Po spracovaní prihlášky Vám e-mailom pošleme zálohovú faktúru. Po úhrade FA Vám pošleme prístup do aplikácie na vzdelávanie. Ak ste na úhradu OFV použili platobnú bránu, prosím počkajte na ďalšie emaily. SBA EDUCA email: podpora@sbaeduca.sk web: www.sbaeduca.sk
